---
title: "Contributors"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)

authors <- yaml::read_yaml("authors.yml")

last_name <- function(x) tail(strsplit(x$name, " ")[[1]], 1)
editors   <- Filter(function(x) x$status == "editor", authors)
others    <- Filter(function(x) x$status != "editor", authors)
editors   <- editors[order(sapply(editors, last_name))]
others    <- others[order(sapply(others,  last_name))]
sorted    <- c(editors, others)

status_badge <- function(status) {
  color <- switch(status,
    editor  = "background:#2c6e49;color:#fff;",
    member  = "background:#1d4e89;color:#fff;",
    guest   = "background:#6c757d;color:#fff;",
    "background:#aaa;color:#fff;"
  )
  sprintf(
    '<span style="font-size:0.72em;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;%s">%s</span>',
    color, tools::toTitleCase(status)
  )
}

orcid_badge <- function(orcid) {
  sprintf(
    '<a href="https://orcid.org/%s" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
       <img src="https://info.orcid.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/orcid_16x16.png"
            style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:4px;">
       <span style="font-size:0.8em;color:#a6ce39;">%s</span>
     </a>',
    orcid, orcid
  )
}

photo_html <- function(id, name) {
  path <- file.path("assets", "authors", paste0(id, ".jpg"))
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    sprintf(
      '<img src="%s" alt="%s"
            style="width:90px;height:90px;object-fit:cover;
                   border-radius:50%%;margin-bottom:8px;">',
      path, name
    )
  } else {
    ""
  }
}

cards <- lapply(sorted, function(a) {
  name_html <- if (!is.null(a$url)) {
    sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" style="font-weight:600;font-size:1.05em;
             text-decoration:none;">%s</a>', a$url, a$name)
  } else {
    sprintf('<span style="font-weight:600;font-size:1.05em;">%s</span>', a$name)
  }

  lines <- c(
    photo_html(a$id, a$name),
    name_html,
    "<br>",
    status_badge(a$status),
    if (!is.null(a$orcid))       paste0("<br>", orcid_badge(a$orcid))                    else "",
    if (!is.null(a$affiliation)) paste0("<br><small>", a$affiliation, "</small>")         else "",
    if (!is.null(a$notes))       paste0("<br><small style='color:#555;'>", a$notes, "</small>") else ""
  )

  sprintf(
    '<div class="g-col-12 g-col-sm-6 g-col-md-4">
       <div style="border:1px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;
                   text-align:center;height:100%%;">
         %s
       </div>
     </div>',
    paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
  )
})

cat('::: {.grid}\n')
cat(paste(cards, collapse = "\n\n"))
cat('\n:::')
```
